title: Chroma Courier
description: Pilot a nimble drone through a neon-drenched, impossible city, racing against time to deliver packages while surviving an onslaught of disruptive energy pulses.

title: AstroBloom Bot
description: Guide a tiny repair bot through a procedurally shifting space garden, collecting resources, crafting tools, and completing quests to restore its vibrant ecosystem.

title: Pulse Orbit
description: Guide a living energy core through eight unstable sectors, gather fragments, choose upgrades, and restore the final orbit.
